name: agentmemory-adapter
purpose: Codex and ClawHub skill bundle for installing, auditing, and hardening AgentMemory integrations.

positioning.primary_user_job: Make AgentMemory reliable across Codex, OpenClaw, and project workspaces.

safety_claims: Does not require credentials for local installs.
Refuses to send bearer tokens over plaintext non-loopback HTTP.
